title: G2PLUS 12PCS Christmas Pull Bows, 5" Wide Ribbon Pull Bows for Gift Wrapping, Christmas Decoration, Hampers, Christmas Wreaths, Bouquets, Green
features: 【Christmas Pull Bows】You will get 12PCS Xmas flower pull bows, sufficient quantity, various styles, and enough amount for decorations for your Christmas theme party present supplies. Feeling free to DIY your present supplies. These Christmas wrap pull bows are made of plastic material, waterproof, lightweight and non-fading, which can be reusable for a long time. They look special beautiful, is an ideal Christmas gift/present wrapping accessory, will be right to create a Christmas festive.

【Large Ribbon Pull Bows】The Large Christmas decorative bow ribbon measures approximately 5''/12cm wide when moulded. The sizing of the product is just right - not too large, which fits most gift parcels and meets your needs for Christmas decorating gifts, cars or weddings.

【Lovely Christmas Pull Bows Ribbon】These Christmas Ribbon Pull Bows have a cute assortment of 12 different designs, using classic Christmas elements, santa claus, snowflakes, present boxes, candy canes, and more classic patterns. They colours are really bright which enhance your gift wrapping and make presents look amazing, ideal for Christmas decorations. They are much bigger and more flamboyant / luxurious than your peel and stick bows.

【Extremely Easy to Use】These Christmas pull bows are very pretty, easy to assemble and a fast way to beautifully wrap your Christmas presents. Essentially you just open the ribbon and pull the 2 pieces outward and you’ll see the ribbon start taking shape, as it goes to the end you’ll be left with a 3D bow and the excess can be used as ribbon to go around the presents. The designs are a good mixture, all of which are a lovely addition to a gift and make them look almost professional.

【Multiple Purposes of Gift Bows】These gift wrapping pull bows are really nice putting a stylish touch to a gift wrapped box, perfect for decorating Christmas presents, Christmas trees, Christmas Wreaths, wine bottles, gift baskets, florists, hampers, parties and other decorations. You can also use them for weddings, anniversaries, birthdays and various other festive occasions, for gift wrapping, crafts, church, cake and flower decorations and more.
